category_sources: source_facts.description says beautiful powerful syntax highlighter; official shiki.style says Shiki is a syntax highlighter.
display_name_sources: Official shiki.style heading uses Shiki; official GitHub repository is shikijs/shiki.
docs_sources: Official shiki.style documentation includes Guide, Installation & Usage, integrations, references, themes, and languages.
repo_sources: Official shiki.style links to GitHub release/contributing pages; official GitHub organization lists shikijs/shiki as the Shiki repository.
tags_sources: Official shiki.style describes TextMate grammar powered highlighting, zero-runtime output, integrations, CLI, themes, and language references.
